200.description: Bounded process, job-runtime, and event-delivery counters
Configuration, workspace state, sandbox, state storage, startup cleanup, and executor admission are ready

503.description: One or more required readiness checks failed

post.description: Request a clean process shutdown. This route exists only in authenticated connection-file sidecar mode.

404.description: Shutdown is unavailable outside sidecar mode

200.description: Persisted workspaces and their current availability
Existing store archived and empty store created

get.description: Authenticated setup-only host directory roots. This route does not expose files.

post.description: Authenticated setup-only directory listing. Symlinks and non-directory entries are excluded.

404.description: Archive absent, expired, or owned by another principal
Archive absent, expired, or owned by another principal

200.description: Bounded relationship page using session-local object IDs
Upload size and optional SHA-256 verified

201.description: Upload atomically copied to a persistent sandbox FileRef

200.description: Cancellation requested or terminal job unchanged

Deprecation.description: RFC 9745 structured date indicating when this resource is or will be deprecated

Sunset.description: RFC 8594 HTTP date after which this resource may become unavailable

DeprecationLink.description: Link to migration guidance using rel=deprecation

sizeBytes.description: Complete stored object file or record size, including object metadata and stored payload bytes.
